subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy second letter of Dhi'l-Qa'dih 37 was received, and from its meanings spiritual joy was obtained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه دوم ذی القعده۳۷ وصول یافت و از معانی سرور روحانی حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
